  • org.apache.juneau.rest.server.converter.Introspectable
    Modifier and Type
    Constant Field
    Value
    public static final String
    SWAGGER_PARAMS
    "{in:\'query\',name:\'invokeMethod\',description:\' The Java method name, optionally with arguments if necessary to differentiate between methods.\',examples:{example:\'toString\'}},\n{in:\'query\',name:\'invokeArgs\',description:\'The arguments as an array.\',examples:{example:\'foo,bar\'}}\n"
  • org.apache.juneau.rest.server.converter.Queryable
    Modifier and Type
    Constant Field
    Value
    public static final String
    SWAGGER_PARAMS
    "\t\t{\n\t\t\tin:\'query\',\n\t\t\tname:\'s\',\n\t\t\tdescription:\'Search.\n\t\t\t\tKey/value pairs representing column names and search tokens.\n\t\t\t\t\\\'*\\\' and \\\'?\\\' can be used as meta-characters in string fields.\n\t\t\t\t\\\'>\\\', \\\'>=\\\', \\\'<\\\', and \\\'<=\\\' can be used as limits on numeric and date fields.\n\t\t\t\tDate fields can be matched with partial dates (e.g. \\\'2018\\\' to match any date in the year 2018).\',\n\t\t\ttype:\'array\',\n\t\t\tcollectionFormat:\'csv\',\n\t\t\texamples:{example:\'?s=Bill*,birthDate>2000\'}\n\t\t},{\n\t\t\tin:\'query\',\n\t\t\tname:\'v\',\n\t\t\tdescription:\'View.\n\t\t\t\tColumn names to display.\',\n\t\t\ttype:\'array\',\n\t\t\tcollectionFormat:\'csv\',\n\t\t\texamples:{example:\'?v=name,birthDate\'}\n\t\t},{\n\t\t\tin:\'query\',\n\t\t\tname:\'o\',\n\t\t\tdescription:\'Order by.\n\t\t\t\tColumns to sort by.\n\t\t\t\tColumn names can be suffixed with \\\'+\\\' or \\\'-\\\' to indicate ascending or descending order.\n\t\t\t\tThe default is ascending order.\',\n\t\t\ttype:\'array\',\n\t\t\tcollectionFormat:\'csv\',\n\t\t\texamples:{example:\'?o=name,birthDate-\'}\n\t\t},{\n\t\t\tin:\'query\',\n\t\t\tname:\'p\',\n\t\t\tdescription:\'Position.\n\t\t\t\tOnly return rows starting at the specified index position (zero-indexed).\n\t\t\t\tDefault is 0\',\n\t\t\ttype:\'integer\',\n\t\t\texamples:{example:\'?p=100\'}\n\t\t},{\n\t\t\tin:\'query\',\n\t\t\tname:\'l\',\n\t\t\tdescription:\'Limit.\n\t\t\t\tOnly return the specified number of rows.\n\t\t\t\tDefault is 0 (meaning return all rows).\',\n\t\t\ttype:\'integer\',\n\t\t\texamples:{example:\'?l=100\'}\n\t\t}"

  • org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.freemarker.FreemarkerViewRenderer
    Modifier and Type
    Constant Field
    Value
    public static final String
    DEFAULT_CONTENT_TYPE
    "text/html;charset=UTF-8"
    public static final String
    NO_ENGINE_DIAGNOSTIC
    "No Apache FreeMarker engine is available on the classpath. Add:\n - org.freemarker:freemarker (FreeMarker engine core)\nOr, for Spring Boot:\n - org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-starter-freemarker\n (autoconfigures a freemarker.template.Configuration bean the bridge picks up).\nOr register a custom @Bean freemarker.template.Configuration with whatever loaders /\nencodings / output formats you need.\nSee https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/FreemarkerViewSupport for the full matrix."
  • org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.jsp.JspDispatcher
    Modifier and Type
    Constant Field
    Value
    public static final String
    DEFAULT_BASE_PATH
    "/"
  • org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.jsp.JspMixin
    Modifier and Type
    Constant Field
    Value
    public static final String
    DEFAULT_BASE_PATH
    "/"
  • org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.jsp.JspViewRenderer
    Modifier and Type
    Constant Field
    Value
    public static final String
    NO_ENGINE_DIAGNOSTIC
    "No JSP engine is available on the classpath. Add one of:\n - org.eclipse.jetty.ee11:jetty-ee11-apache-jsp (Jetty 12 EE11)\n - org.apache.tomcat.embed:tomcat-embed-jasper (embedded Tomcat / Spring Boot default)\n - Or rely on the deployment container\'s bundled engine (Tomcat / JBoss / WildFly / ...)\nSee https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/JspViewSupport for the full matrix."
  • org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.mustache.MustacheDispatcher
    Modifier and Type

    Value

    DEFAULT_TEMPLATE_SUFFIX
    ""
  • org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.mustache.MustacheMixin
    Modifier and Type
    Constant Field
    Value
    public static final String

    "/"
    public static final String
    DEFAULT_TEMPLATE_SUFFIX
    ""
  • org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.mustache.MustacheViewRenderer
    Modifier and Type
    Constant Field
    Value
    public static final String
    DEFAULT_CONTENT_TYPE
    "text/html;charset=UTF-8"
    public static final String
    NO_ENGINE_DIAGNOSTIC
    "No Mustache engine is available on the classpath. Add:\n - com.github.spullara.mustache.java:compiler (mustache.java \u2014 the engine the bridge targets)\nOr register a custom @Bean MustacheFactory that picks up your preferred resolvers.\nNote: Spring Boot\'s spring-boot-starter-mustache ships com.samskivert:jmustache, NOT\nmustache.java; the bridge is mustache.java-specific. To use jmustache, supply your own\nResponseProcessor instead of MustacheViewRenderer.\nSee https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/MustacheViewSupport for the full matrix."
  • org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.thymeleaf.ThymeleafDispatcher
    Modifier and Type
    Constant Field
    Value
    public static final String
    DEFAULT_BASE_PATH
    "/"
    public static final boolean
    DEFAULT_CACHE_TEMPLATES
    true
  • org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.thymeleaf.ThymeleafMixin
    Modifier and Type
    Constant Field
    Value
    public static final String
    DEFAULT_BASE_PATH
    "/"
    public static final boolean
    DEFAULT_CACHE_TEMPLATES
    true
  • org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.thymeleaf.ThymeleafViewRenderer
    Modifier and Type
    Constant Field
    Value
    public static final String
    DEFAULT_CONTENT_TYPE
    "text/html;charset=UTF-8"
    public static final String
    NO_ENGINE_DIAGNOSTIC
    "No Thymeleaf engine is available on the classpath. Add one of:\n - org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-starter-thymeleaf (Spring Boot autoconfig)\n - org.thymeleaf:thymeleaf (Juneau microservice / Jetty)\nOr register a custom @Bean TemplateEngine that picks up your preferred resolvers.\nSee https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/ThymeleafViewSupport for the full matrix."
